title: cryptantha caespitosa
intro: Cryptantha caespitosa, also known as Rock Cryptantha, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rock Cryptantha include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cryptantha caespitosa include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to reap its benefits.
